user_system_path: Value-delivery fix (#516): the daily verdict has been dark since March because hunt candidates dropped their source date, so the positive_winner_contract currentness/anchor gates blocked ~96% of winners. Ground the findings (carry the real newest-signal date through HuntFinding.newestSignalAt -> sourceSignals[].occurredAt) so fresh, real anomalies ship while genuinely stale evidence (>14d) is still correctly blocked. No gate is loosened (per docs/CONTEXT.md).
allowed_files_raw: lib/briefing/hunt-anomalies.ts (add HuntFinding.newestSignalAt + populate from newest supporting signal occurred_at); lib/briefing/scorer.ts (huntFindingToScoredLoop: propagate occurredAt: f.newestSignalAt onto sourceSignals; export it for testing); lib/briefing/__tests__/hunt-grounding-516.test.ts (new: grounding + propagation + gate-flip incl. no-loosening guard); lib/briefing/__tests__/pipeline-receipt.test.ts (update the 90d-email block reason to stale_evidence_over_14d, the now-accurate reason). Control-plane governance files.
forbidden_files_raw: No Stripe, Scout, schema/migration, or secrets changes. No auto-send. Do NOT loosen positive_winner_contract thresholds or touch the deliberate goal-drift missing_current_artifact_anchor behavior; this is a grounding fix only.
required_local_proof: npm run gate:continuity && npm run typecheck && npx vitest run lib/briefing/__tests__/
required_browser_proof: Live (owner): after the next pipeline run, pipeline_runs shows generation_returned instead of generation_failed_sentinel for the owner, and a real briefing appears on the dashboard (/api/briefing/latest).
browser_proof_command: manual: trigger the morning pipeline (or wait for cron), then query pipeline_runs for outcome=generation_returned and confirm a new tkg_briefings row / dashboard verdict.
acceptance_condition: Hunt findings carry their real newest-signal date through to sourceSignals[].occurredAt; a fresh hunt candidate is no longer blocked by missing_current_artifact_anchor / stale_status_without_current_artifact_facts, while >14d evidence is still blocked by stale_evidence_over_14d; gate:continuity + typecheck green; full briefing suite (incl. new hunt-grounding-516) green.
anti_regression_checks: hunt-grounding-516 suite: undated blocked, dated ships, 30d still blocked
full lib/briefing/__tests__ suite green (no positive_winner_contract / winner-selection regression)
no loosening of positive_winner_contract thresholds; goal-drift anchor behavior unchanged
no edits under app/api/stripe, lib/scout, supabase/migrations
stop_condition: Grounding fix lands as a PR on claude/verdict-grounding-516 targeting #516; gate:continuity + typecheck + the briefing suite green. Live confirmation (pipeline_runs flips to generation_returned, a real briefing appears) is owner-validated after the next pipeline run.
next_command: Owner: merge #516, then trigger the morning pipeline (or wait for the 11:00 cron) and confirm a real daily verdict appears. Optional next: review whether the remaining gates (missing_schedule_resolution_context on real calendar-gap cards, goal-drift anchor) are still too strict; Scout #494 activation.
